records.ety: [Gr. <?/ double (di- = di`s- twice + <?/ to produce) + 'odoy`s, 'odo`ntos, tooth.]

defs: Having two successive sets of teeth (deciduous and permanent), one succeeding the other; as, a diphyodont mammal; diphyodont dentition; -- opposed to monophyodont.
An animal having two successive sets of teeth.
